productDisplayName: Puma Men Solid White  Logo 3/4 Pants
description: Composition White capris made of 100% polyester on the outside with an inner lining of 65% polyester and 35% cotton, has a broad elasticated waistband and drawstring on the inseam, two insert pockets on the sides, toggle straps on either sides of the hem, inner mesh lining, graphic branding above the right hem and embroidered branding below the left pocket Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash inside out with like colours using cold water Do not bleach, or dry clean Tumble dry low Cool iron inside out Do not iron on decorations Whaever the occasion, be it just going to the mall or park, jogging or just hanging out with friends over the weekend, this pair of capris from puma is a well deserved addition to your casual wardrobe. The sporty look does wonders for your casual style and the soft fabric keeps you extremely comfortable. Pair this with a sporty T-shirt and running shoes. Model Statistics Model is a size M of height 6' and waist 28"
